division_title: PENALTIES AND DISPOSITION OF FEES, FINES, AND FORFEITURES
chapter_title: Disposition of Fees, Fines, and Forfeitures
text: On and after January 1, 2022, the unpaid balance of any court-imposed costs pursuant to Section 40508.5 and subdivision (g) of Section 40510.5, as those sections read on December 31, 2021, shall be unenforceable and uncollectible and any portion of a judgment imposing those costs shall be vacated.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 18. PENALTIES AND DISPOSITION OF FEES, FINES, AND FORFEITURES [42000 - 42277]
### Chapter 2. Disposition of Fees, Fines, and Forfeitures [42200 - 42240]
#### Article 3. Uncollectible Costs [42240- 42240.]
##### § 42240

On and after January 1, 2022, the unpaid balance of any court-imposed costs pursuant to Section 40508.5 and subdivision (g) of Section 40510.5, as those sections read on December 31, 2021, shall be unenforceable and uncollectible and any portion of a judgment imposing those costs shall be vacated.

*(Added by Stats. 2021, Ch. 257, Sec. 45. (AB 177) Effective September 23, 2021.)*

subsections.text: On and after January 1, 2022, the unpaid balance of any court-imposed costs pursuant to Section 40508.5 and subdivision (g) of Section 40510.5, as those sections read on December 31, 2021, shall be unenforceable and uncollectible and any portion of a judgment imposing those costs shall be vacated.
